initial_description:
Here is a detailed description of the illustrative figure:

**1. Overall Layout:**
The diagram is structured as a horizontal pipeline, flowing from left to right. It consists of three large, distinct phases or "Stages," each enclosed within its own colored rectangular container. These stages are visually separated but connected by arrows indicating the flow of data or processes. The overall background of the figure is pure white.

**2. Components:**

*   **Stage 1 Container (Leftmost, Yellow):**
    *   **Background:** A soft, light pastel yellow.
    *   **Title:** "Stage 1" (large, bold, dark gray text)
    *   **Subtitle:** "Classification" (smaller, dark gray text, below title)
    *   **Unit Label:** "unit: post" (small, dark gray text, positioned at the top right corner of the container)
    *   **Internal Boxes (Top to Bottom):**
        *   "Platform records": A light gray rectangular box with a thin dark gray border.
        *   "Rule + keyword screen": A light gray rectangular box with a thin dark gray border.
        *   "Candidate posts": A light sky blue rectangular box with a thin dark blue border.
        *   "Relevance coding": A light peach rectangular box with a thin dark gray border.
        *   "Dimension tagging": A light peach rectangular box with a thin dark gray border.
        *   "Classified post base": An emphasized rectangular box with a solid dark gray fill, bold white text, and a thick black border.

*   **Stage 2 Container (Middle, Blue):**
    *   **Background:** A soft, light pastel blue.
    *   **Title:** "Stage 2" (large, bold, dark gray text)
    *   **Subtitle:** "EB aggregation" (smaller, dark gray text, below title)
    *   **Unit Label:** "unit: district x dimension" (small, dark gray text, positioned at the top right corner of the container)
    *   **Internal Boxes (Top to Bottom):**
        *   "Classified post base": A light gray rectangular box with a thin dark gray border.
        *   "Dong linkage": A light sky blue rectangular box with a thin dark blue border.
        *   "Exposure denominator": A light sky blue rectangular box with a thin dark blue border. Below its main label, in smaller, lighter gray text: "person-time".
        *   "Observed post rate": A light sky blue rectangular box with a thin dark blue border.
        *   "EB shrinkage": A light sky blue rectangular box with a thin dark blue border. Below its main label, in smaller, lighter gray text: "prior + observed rate".
        *   "Posterior rate": A light sky blue rectangular box with a thin dark blue border. Below its main label, in smaller, lighter gray text: "per 100k person-years".
        *   "High-z_shift review cells": An emphasized rectangular box with a light peach fill and a thin dark orange border.

*   **Stage 3 Container (Rightmost, Green):**
    *   **Background:** A soft, light pastel green.
    *   **Title:** "Stage 3" (large, bold, dark gray text)
    *   **Subtitle:** "Evidence-grounded judgment" (smaller, dark gray text, below title)
    *   **Unit Label:** "unit: post-level case" (small, dark gray text, positioned at the top right corner of the container)
    *   **Internal Groupings (Information Boundary):** Two side-by-side rectangular regions with dashed borders, indicating an "information boundary."
        *   **Left Grouping (I_R):** A dashed light blue rectangular border. Label at the top left of this region: "I_R: Stage A/B isolated inputs" (small, light blue text).
            *   **Internal Boxes:**
                *   "Stage A post record": A light gray rectangular box with a thin dark gray border, positioned towards the top of I_R.
                *   Three hypothesis boxes, stacked vertically to the right of "Stage A post record":
                    *   "Abductive hyp.": A light sage green rectangular box with a thin dark green border.
                    *   "Forward hyp.": A light sage green rectangular box with a thin dark green border.
                    *   "Sequential hyp.": A light sage green rectangular box with a thin dark green border.
            *   **Annotation:** "Stage B: no district profiles or evidence" (small, light blue text, positioned below the hypothesis boxes).
        *   **Right Grouping (I_J):** A dashed light orange rectangular border. Label at the top left of this region: "I_J: Stage C/D/E evidence set" (small, light orange text).
            *   **Internal Boxes (Top to Bottom):**
                *   "Stage C data specification": A light peach rectangular box with a thin dark orange border.
                *   "Stage D rule-based evidence": A light sky blue rectangular box with a thin dark blue border.
                *   "Stage E judgment": A light peach rectangular box with a thin dark orange border.
                *   "Supported final coding": A light gray rectangular box with slightly rounded corners and a thin dark gray border.

**3. Connections:**

*   **Within Stages:** All internal processes within Stage 1, Stage 2, and the I_J grouping of Stage 3 are connected by solid, single-headed, medium-thickness dark gray arrows, indicating a top-to-bottom flow. Within the I_R grouping of Stage 3, "Stage A post record" connects to each of the three hypothesis boxes with diverging solid, single-headed, medium-thickness dark green arrows.
*   **Between Stages:**
    *   A solid, single-headed, medium-thickness black arrow originates from the "Classified post base" (dark gray box) in Stage 1, extends horizontally to the right, bends downwards, and points to the "Classified post base" (light gray box) at the top of Stage 2. This arrow is labeled "classified base" in small black text.
    *   A solid, single-headed, medium-thickness orange arrow originates from the "High-z_shift review cells" box in Stage 2, extends horizontally to the right, and points to the "Stage A post record" box within the I_R grouping of Stage 3. This arrow is labeled "review cells" in small orange text.
*   **Across Information Boundary (Stage 3):** Three solid, single-headed, medium-thickness orange arrows originate from each of the three hypothesis boxes ("Abductive hyp.", "Forward hyp.", "Sequential hyp.") in the I_R grouping, cross the dashed boundary, and converge to point at the "Stage C data specification" box in the I_J grouping.

**4. Groupings:**
*   The three main "Stages" (Stage 1, Stage 2, Stage 3) are the primary groupings, each enclosed in a large, distinct pastel-colored rectangle (yellow, blue, green, respectively).
*   Within Stage 3, an "information boundary" is visually represented by two adjacent dashed rectangular boxes:
    *   The left box (I_R) has a light blue dashed border.
    *   The right box (I_J) has a light orange dashed border.

**5. Labels and Annotations:**
*   Main stage titles (e.g., "Stage 1") are large, bold, and dark gray.
*   Stage subtitles (e.g., "Classification") are smaller, dark gray.
*   Unit labels (e.g., "unit: post") are small, dark gray, and positioned at the top right of their respective stage containers.
*   Internal box labels are concise (1-2 words), dark gray for most, white for the emphasized "Classified post base" in Stage 1.
*   Sub-labels within boxes (e.g., "person-time") are smaller and lighter gray.
*   Arrow labels ("classified base", "review cells") are small and match the arrow color (black or orange).
*   Grouping labels ("I_R: Stage A/B isolated inputs", "I_J: Stage C/D/E evidence set") are small and match the dashed border color (light blue or light orange).
*   The annotation "Stage B: no district profiles or evidence" is small and light blue.

**6. Input/Output:**
*   The overall input to the system is "Platform records" in Stage 1.
*   The final output of the system is "Supported final coding" in Stage 3.
*   Intermediate outputs are passed between stages (e.g., "Classified post base" from Stage 1 to Stage 2, "High-z_shift review cells" from Stage 2 to Stage 3).

**7. Styling:**
*   **Background Fills:** Stage 1: light pastel yellow. Stage 2: light pastel blue. Stage 3: light pastel green. The overall figure background is pure white.
*   **Color Palette (Boxes):**
    *   Inputs/Outputs: Light gray (e.g., "Platform records", "Classified post base" in Stage 2, "Stage A post record", "Supported final coding").
    *   Screening/Processing Steps: Light sky blue (e.g., "Candidate posts", "Dong linkage", "Exposure denominator", "Observed post rate", "EB shrinkage", "Posterior rate", "Stage D rule-based evidence").
    *   Coding/Tagging/Review/Judgment: Light peach/orange (e.g., "Relevance coding", "Dimension tagging", "High-z_shift review cells", "Stage C data specification", "Stage E judgment").
    *   Hypotheses: Light sage green (e.g., "Abductive hyp.", "Forward hyp.", "Sequential hyp.").
    *   Emphasized Output (Stage 1): Dark gray fill with white text.
*   **Borders:** Most boxes have thin dark gray, dark blue, dark green, or dark orange borders matching their internal color scheme. The "Classified post base" (Stage 1 output) has a thick black border. Grouping boundaries (I_R, I_J) are dashed light blue and light orange.
*   **Line Weights:** Arrows are of medium thickness. Emphasized box borders are thicker.
*   **Font Style:** All text uses a clean, sans-serif font. Titles are bold and larger. Sub-text and annotations are smaller and lighter.
optimized_description:
**1. Overall Layout:**
The diagram is structured as a horizontal pipeline, flowing from left to right. It consists of three large, distinct phases or "Stages," each enclosed within its own subtly colored rectangular container with gently rounded corners. These stages are visually separated but connected by arrows indicating the flow of data or processes. The overall background of the figure is pristine white, providing a clean canvas.

**2. Components:**

*   **Stage 1 Container (Leftmost):**
    *   **Background:** A very pale, warm cream yellow, like soft buttercup.
    *   **Title:** "Stage 1" in large, bold, dark charcoal gray sans-serif text.
    *   **Subtitle:** "Classification" in smaller, dark charcoal gray sans-serif text, positioned below the title.
    *   **Unit Label:** "unit: post" in small, dark charcoal gray sans-serif text, positioned at the top right corner of the container.
    *   **Internal Boxes (Top to Bottom):** All internal process nodes are rounded rectangles with borders that are a slightly darker shade of their fill color.
        *   "Platform records": A soft light gray rounded rectangle with a thin dark gray border.
        *   "Rule + keyword screen": A soft light gray rounded rectangle with a thin dark gray border.
        *   "Candidate posts": A gentle sky blue rounded rectangle with a thin muted blue border.
        *   "Relevance coding": A soft peach rounded rectangle with a thin muted orange border.
        *   "Dimension tagging": A soft peach rounded rectangle with a thin muted orange border.
        *   "Classified post base": An emphasized rounded rectangle with a soft, slightly deeper slate blue fill, bold white sans-serif text, and a slightly darker, muted blue border.

*   **Stage 2 Container (Middle):**
    *   **Background:** A very pale, serene sky blue.
    *   **Title:** "Stage 2" in large, bold, dark charcoal gray sans-serif text.
    *   **Subtitle:** "EB aggregation" in smaller, dark charcoal gray sans-serif text, positioned below the title.
    *   **Unit Label:** "unit: district x dimension" in small, dark charcoal gray sans-serif text, positioned at the top right corner of the container.
    *   **Internal Boxes (Top to Bottom):** All internal process nodes are rounded rectangles with borders that are a slightly darker shade of their fill color.
        *   "Classified post base": A rounded rectangle with a soft, slightly deeper slate blue fill, bold white sans-serif text, and a slightly darker, muted blue border (visually matching the output from Stage 1).
        *   "Dong linkage": A gentle sky blue rounded rectangle with a thin muted blue border.
        *   "Exposure denominator": A gentle sky blue rounded rectangle with a thin muted blue border. Below its main label, in smaller, lighter gray sans-serif text: "person-time".
        *   "Observed post rate": A gentle sky blue rounded rectangle with a thin muted blue border.
        *   "EB shrinkage": A gentle sky blue rounded rectangle with a thin muted blue border. Below its main label, in smaller, lighter gray sans-serif text: "prior + observed rate".
        *   "Posterior rate": A gentle sky blue rounded rectangle with a thin muted blue border. Below its main label, in smaller, lighter gray sans-serif text: "per 100k person-years".
        *   "High-z_shift review cells": An emphasized rounded rectangle with a soft, warm coral peach fill and a slightly deeper coral border.

*   **Stage 3 Container (Rightmost):**
    *   **Background:** A very pale, calming mint green.
    *   **Title:** "Stage 3" in large, bold, dark charcoal gray sans-serif text.
    *   **Subtitle:** "Evidence-grounded judgment" in smaller, dark charcoal gray sans-serif text, positioned below the title.
    *   **Unit Label:** "unit: post-level case" in small, dark charcoal gray sans-serif text, positioned at the top right corner of the container.
    *   **Internal Groupings (Information Boundary):** Two side-by-side rectangular regions with rounded dashed borders, indicating an "information boundary."
        *   **Left Grouping (I_R):** A rounded dashed border in a soft, muted blue. Label at the top left of this region: "I_R: Stage A/B isolated inputs" in small, muted blue sans-serif text.
            *   **Internal Boxes:** All internal process nodes are rounded rectangles with borders that are a slightly darker shade of their fill color.
                *   "Stage A post record": A soft light gray rounded rectangle with a thin dark gray border, positioned towards the top of I_R.
                *   Three hypothesis boxes, stacked vertically to the right of "Stage A post record":
                    *   "Abductive hyp.": A muted sage green rounded rectangle with a thin deeper green border.
                    *   "Forward hyp.": A muted sage green rounded rectangle with a thin deeper green border.
                    *   "Sequential hyp.": A muted sage green rounded rectangle with a thin deeper green border.
            *   **Annotation:** "Stage B: no district profiles or evidence" in small, muted blue sans-serif text, positioned below the hypothesis boxes.
        *   **Right Grouping (I_J):** A rounded dashed border in a soft, muted orange. Label at the top left of this region: "I_J: Stage C/D/E evidence set" in small, muted orange sans-serif text.
            *   **Internal Boxes (Top to Bottom):** All internal process nodes are rounded rectangles with borders that are a slightly darker shade of their fill color.
                *   "Stage C data specification": A soft peach rounded rectangle with a thin muted orange border.
                *   "Stage D rule-based evidence": A gentle sky blue rounded rectangle with a thin muted blue border.
                *   "Stage E judgment": A soft peach rounded rectangle with a thin muted orange border.
                *   "Supported final coding": A rounded rectangle with a soft, muted teal green fill and a slightly darker teal border, indicating a final, refined output.

**3. Connections:**

*   **Within Stages:** All internal processes within Stage 1, Stage 2, and the I_J grouping of Stage 3 are connected by solid, single-headed, medium-thickness dark charcoal gray arrows, indicating a clear top-to-bottom flow. Within the I_R grouping of Stage 3, "Stage A post record" connects to each of the three hypothesis boxes with diverging solid, single-headed, medium-thickness muted dark green arrows.
*   **Between Stages:**
    *   A solid, single-headed, medium-thickness muted slate blue arrow originates from the "Classified post base" in Stage 1, extends horizontally to the right, bends downwards, and points to the "Classified post base" at the top of Stage 2. This arrow is labeled "classified base" in small muted slate blue sans-serif text.
    *   A solid, single-headed, medium-thickness muted coral peach arrow originates from the "High-z_shift review cells" box in Stage 2, extends horizontally to the right, and points to the "Stage A post record" box within the I_R grouping of Stage 3. This arrow is labeled "review cells" in small muted coral peach sans-serif text.
*   **Across Information Boundary (Stage 3):** Three solid, single-headed, medium-thickness muted dark gray arrows originate from each of the three hypothesis boxes ("Abductive hyp.", "Forward hyp.", "Sequential hyp.") in the I_R grouping, gracefully cross the dashed boundary, and converge to point at the "Stage C data specification" box in the I_J grouping.

**4. Groupings:**
*   The three main "Stages" (Stage 1, Stage 2, Stage 3) are the primary groupings, each enclosed in a large, distinct, very pale pastel-colored rectangle with gently rounded corners (warm cream yellow, serene sky blue, calming mint green, respectively).
*   Within Stage 3, an "information boundary" is visually represented by two adjacent rounded dashed rectangular boxes:
    *   The left box (I_R) has a soft, muted blue dashed border.
    *   The right box (I_J) has a soft, muted orange dashed border.

**5. Labels and Annotations:**
*   All text uses a clean, professional sans-serif font.
*   Main stage titles (e.g., "Stage 1") are large, bold, and dark charcoal gray.
*   Stage subtitles (e.g., "Classification") are smaller, dark charcoal gray.
*   Unit labels (e.g., "unit: post") are small, dark charcoal gray, and positioned at the top right of their respective stage containers.
*   Internal box labels are concise (1-2 words), dark charcoal gray for most, and bold white for the emphasized "Classified post base" in Stage 1 and Stage 2.
*   Sub-labels within boxes (e.g., "person-time") are smaller and lighter gray.
*   Arrow labels ("classified base", "review cells") are small and match the arrow's color.
*   Grouping labels ("I_R: Stage A/B isolated inputs", "I_J: Stage C/D/E evidence set") are small and match the dashed border color.
*   The annotation "Stage B: no district profiles or evidence" is small and muted blue.

**6. Input/Output:**
*   The overall input to the system is "Platform records" in Stage 1.
*   The final output of the system is "Supported final coding" in Stage 3.
*   Intermediate outputs are clearly passed between stages (e.g., "Classified post base" from Stage 1 to Stage 2, "High-z_shift review cells" from Stage 2 to Stage 3).

**7. Styling:**
*   **Background Fills:** Stage 1: very pale, warm cream yellow. Stage 2: very pale, serene sky blue. Stage 3: very pale, calming mint green. The overall figure background is pristine white.
*   **Color Palette (Boxes):**
    *   Initial Inputs: Soft light gray.
    *   Screening/Processing Steps: Gentle sky blue.
    *   Coding/Tagging/Review/Judgment: Soft peach.
    *   Hypotheses: Muted sage green.
    *   Emphasized Output (Stage 1 & 2 Input): Soft, slightly deeper slate blue fill with bold white text.
    *   Emphasized Output (Stage 2): Soft, warm coral peach fill.
    *   Final Output (Stage 3): Soft, muted teal green fill.
*   **Borders:** Most boxes have thin borders that are a slightly darker shade of their internal fill color. Emphasized boxes have slightly thicker, darker borders that complement their fill. Grouping boundaries (I_R, I_J) are rounded dashed lines in muted blue and muted orange.
*   **Line Weights:** Arrows are of medium thickness. Emphasized box borders are subtly thicker than standard process node borders.
*   **Font Style:** All text uses a clean, sans-serif font. Titles are bold and larger. Sub-text and annotations are smaller and lighter.
